title.en: One Billion Gall Blue Treasure Coins!

content.en:
One Billion Gall Blue Treasure Coins!

The Blood Refining Sect Master was excited, he had a lot of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds, if they were all sold to the Ziya Realm God, it would be a huge fortune!

However, he held back.

"It's still not enough!"

The Blood Refining Sect Master said.

"It's not enough, then you say how much!"

Ye Tian was a little annoyed, this Blood Refining Sect Master was really too greedy.

Did the other party think that he didn't dare to make a move, even if he killed the Blood Refining Sect Master and snatched the Dragon Blood Blood Seed of the Black Scale Domain, the Blood Refining Sect would have no way to help him, even if he sued the Refining Treasure Building, the Refining Treasure Building would not be able to find him.

Because the real god of the Ziya realm has fallen, even if he uses the most anti-heaven deduction treasure, he can't deduce ~ the slightest trace of the god of the Ziya realm.

The fallen half-step extradimensional realm cannot be deduced from other information.

It's just that the Blood Refining Sect hasn't offended him yet, so he naturally won't do it, and what can be solved with Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, he will definitely use Super Dimensional Treasure Coin to solve it.

The Blood Refining Sect Master thought for a moment and said his conditions: "100 million Gala Blue Treasure Coins, plus the method of domain dragon transformation, I can give you ten drops of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds and ten drops of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood for the Ziya Realm God!"

The method of domain dragon transformation!

Ye Tian took a deep look at the Blood Refining Sect Master, this guy was really greedy, and he even dared to seek his domain dragon transformation method.

"I don't have the method of transforming the domain dragon, so I can't trade with you. Moreover, I am already in the half-step transcendent realm, but I can't use the black scale domain dragon bloodline seed to transform the physical body, and if you ask me for the domain dragon transformation method, I can't take it out. "

Ye Tian said.

The Blood Refining Sect Master said again: "Ziya Realm God, the forces behind you should have the method of domain dragon transformation, and for you, there is no loss in taking out the method of domain dragon transformation." "

"No, if the Blood Refining Sect Master is unwilling to trade, then forget it!"

Let's say, Ye Tian is leaving.

"Don't go, the gods of the Ziya Realm, we can continue to talk!" the Blood Refining Sect Master hurriedly said.

Ye Tian fled directly, and the Blood Refining Sect Master was in a hurry and chased after him.

"Ziya Realm God, we are willing to sell it to you at the price of 100 million super dimensional treasure coins and a Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed!"

The Blood Refining Sect Master said.

Hearing this, Ye Tian stopped.

"Okay, take out your Blood Refining Sect's Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seed!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Blood Refining Sect Master responded.

He knew that the planning of the domain dragon transformation method would definitely not work, but if he didn't sell the black scale domain dragon bloodline seeds, it would definitely not work, the news had been leaked, who knew if he would be targeted by other half-step superdimensional realm powerhouses.

Therefore, it is still necessary to sell it as soon as possible, and it is the most cost-effective way to exchange it for Super Dimensional Treasure Coins.

And so.

The Blood Refining Sect Master immediately went to get the Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Blood Seed, and he also took out all the Black Lin Domain Dragon Blood Blood Seed, and even the Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood was also taken out.

"Ziya Realm God, here are sixty-six Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed and one hundred Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood. "

Blood Refining Sect Master.

In order to prevent Ye Tian from making a move on him, he held these things tightly, and in case Ye Tian made a move, he would directly destroy these things.

In addition, he also secretly urged the large array, condensing the power of the formation on the whole body and enhancing the defense.

This is also a necessary act.

However, in Ye Tian's opinion, such behavior is a bit ridiculous.

If he wanted to kill the Blood Refining Sect Master, he could kill him with a wave of his hand.

Of course, with his current wealth, he only paid some super dimensional treasure coins, and there was no need to intercept and kill the Blood Refining Sect Master.

However, he still had to teach the Blood Refining Sect a lesson afterwards, so that the Blood Refining Sect knew that the lion had to pay a price for opening his mouth before.

"One Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed is 100 million Gala Blue Treasure Coins, and the Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood is 50 million Gala Blue Treasure Coins, and the things you have here are worth a total of 11.6 billion Gala Blue Treasure Coins!" Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Blood Refining Sect Master was excited.

More than 10 billion Galanbol coins, for him, 100 million Galanbol coins is a lot.

More than 10 billion Galanbao coins, only those who have the powerhouse of the super-dimensional realm can take it out, and those who have a half-step super-dimensional realm can hardly get it.

But does this half-step Extradimensional Realm have so many Superdimensional Treasure Coins on his body?

But he soon didn't have to doubt it, because Ye Tian directly took out 11.6 billion super dimensional treasure coins, put them in a storage equipment, and handed them to the Blood Refining Sect Master.

0 for flowers0

After the Blood Refining Sect Master took it, he also handed over these Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Seed and Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood to Ye Tian.

Seeing Ye Tian leaving, the Blood Refining Sect Master breathed a sigh of relief, he was really afraid that Ye Tian would kill him, and even secretly began to contact the Refining Treasure Building, if Ye Tian really did it, he would directly ask the Refining Treasure Building for help.

But fortunately, Ye Tian didn't do anything, and he could rest assured.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian spread a message, that is, the Blood Refining Sect traded a batch of Black Scale Domain Dragon Blood Bloodline Seeds and obtained more than 10 billion Gala Blue Treasure Coins.

A small force that doesn't even have a half-step transcendent realm, with so many Galan Treasure Coins, is definitely a big trouble.

But it has nothing to do with him!

After a while.

Ye Tian built a Void Breaking Star Array in a remote place in the Six Thousand Territory, and used the Boundary Disk to open this large array, and paid a certain price for a copy of the Six Frontier to return to the Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters with many resources. []

Then from the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization, he returned to the territory of 7362.

In this way, these resources can be considered safe.

The Bounds of the Endless Seams.

Ye Tian returned to the Terran Temple, and then put the Domain Dragon Transformation Method, as well as those Black Scale Domain Dragon bloodline seeds and true blood, here, and let the peak realm gods of the Terran Race exchange them.

Of course, once the transformation is completed, what the consequences will be, will also be fully informed.

If you are not sure of impacting the superdimensional realm, then cultivating the method of domain dragon transformation and fusing the bloodline seeds of the black scale domain dragon is undoubtedly the best choice, at least there will be great hope of breaking through to become a half-step superdimensional realm in the future, but the hope of breaking through to the superdimensional realm will be completely lost.

However, Ye Tian forbade his relatives to practice.

His own relatives, he may have the hope of forcibly helping them to impact the transcendent realm in the future, if he cultivates the method of domain dragon transformation now, then he will completely lose the opportunity.

And after the method of domain dragon transformation was laid out, the human race was excited.
